ConfigMapV1.description: Kubernetes core/v1 ConfigMap accepted only for Mount Thor customer VM bootstrap data. Tenant admission requires metadata.labels.vm.mountthor.dev/customer-bootstrap=true for customer create, update, patch, and delete.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this bootstrap ConfigMap.

binaryData.description: Non-secret binary bootstrap data encoded as base64 values.

data.description: Non-secret bootstrap key/value data. Do not place credentials or private keys here.

immutable.description: Whether Kubernetes should prevent future changes to this ConfigMap.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata. Customer-created bootstrap ConfigMaps must include the required Mount Thor bootstrap label.

annotations.description: Optional annotations attached to the ConfigMap.

vm.mountthor.dev/customer-bootstrap.description: Required label proving this ConfigMap is customer bootstrap data.

name.description: ConfigMap name inside the tenant namespace.

namespace.description: Must match the namespace bound to the Mount Thor compute session.

MacAccessSessionV1ALPHA1.description: Customer request to open short-lived access to a ready MacLease.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this MacAccessSession resource. Use `control.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the MacAccessSession in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the MacAccessSession.

leaseRef.description: Name of the ready MacLease to open access for.

principal.description: Customer user or automation identity that will use the session.

reason.description: Optional audit reason for opening access.

type.description: Access type to open, such as SSH or Screen Sharing over SSH.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the MacAccessSession. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the MacAccessSession.

MacImageChannelV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible macOS image channel available for bare-metal reinstall workflows.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this MacImageChannel resource. Use `control.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the MacImageChannel in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the MacImageChannel.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the MacImageChannel. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

MacIncidentV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible incident record for a bare-metal lease or access workflow.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this MacIncident resource. Use `control.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the MacIncident in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the MacIncident.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the MacIncident. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

MacLeaseClassV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible bare-metal hardware class that can be requested by MacLease resources.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this MacLeaseClass resource. Use `control.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the MacLeaseClass in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the MacLeaseClass.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the MacLeaseClass. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

MacLeaseOperationV1ALPHA1.description: Customer request to run an explicit operation, such as reset or reinstall, against a MacLease.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this MacLeaseOperation resource. Use `control.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the MacLeaseOperation in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the MacLeaseOperation.

leaseRef.description: Name of the MacLease to operate on.

operation.description: Operation to run against the lease, such as reset or reinstall.

reason.description: Optional audit reason for the operation.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the MacLeaseOperation. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the MacLeaseOperation.

MacLeaseV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-owned bare-metal Mac allocation managed through the Compute API.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this MacLease resource. Use `control.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the MacLease in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the MacLease.

accessPolicy.description: Access methods to prepare for this lease.

imageChannelRef.description: macOS image channel to install before access is granted.

placement.description: Optional placement preferences for capacity selection.

releasePolicy.description: Host cleanup policy applied when the lease is deleted.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: the same lease must not appear in both coLocateWithLeases and antiCoLocateWithLeases

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the MacLease. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the MacLease.

TenantCapacityStatusV1ALPHA1.description: Read-only customer capacity signal for the tenant namespace.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this TenantCapacityStatus resource. Use `control.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the TenantCapacityStatus in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the TenantCapacityStatus.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the TenantCapacityStatus. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the VirtualMachineImageOperation.

VirtualMachineImageV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-visible VM image available for VirtualMachine resources.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the VirtualMachineImage. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the VirtualMachineImage.

VirtualMachineOperationV1ALPHA1.description: Customer request to run an explicit operation against a VirtualMachine.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this VirtualMachineOperation resource. Use `vm.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the VirtualMachineOperation in the tenant namespace.

spec.description: Desired customer-owned state for the VirtualMachineOperation.

reason.description: Optional audit reason for the operation.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the VirtualMachineOperation. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

VirtualMachineV1ALPHA1.description: Customer-owned macOS virtual machine managed through the Compute API.

apiVersion.description: Kubernetes API version for this VirtualMachine resource. Use `vm.mountthor.dev/v1alpha1`.

metadata.description: Kubernetes object metadata for the VirtualMachine in the tenant namespace.

imageRef.description: Image reference used to boot the VM.

status.description: Observed Mount Thor status for the VirtualMachine. Customers read status; create and update requests should not set it.

type.description: PlacementResolved CapacityAdmitted HostResolved ImageResolved ImageReady ImageCachedOnHost ProviderBound PortsPublished MetricsPersisted Ready Terminal

failureCode.description: Customer-visible failure code when reconciliation fails.

failureMessage.description: Customer-visible failure message when reconciliation fails.

phase.description: Current customer-visible lifecycle phase for the VirtualMachine.

info.description: Generated Kubernetes-compatible customer compute schemas. Do not edit by hand.
info.title: Mount Thor Customer Compute CRDs

get.description: Lists tenant-scoped, non-secret VM bootstrap ConfigMaps. Use only ConfigMaps labeled vm.mountthor.dev/customer-bootstrap=true for customer VM bootstrap data.

parameters.description: Tenant namespace returned by Get Account.
parameters.name: namespace

parameters.description: Set true for Kubernetes watch semantics when the resource allows watch.
parameters.name: watch

post.description: Creates tenant-scoped, non-secret VM bootstrap data. The ConfigMap must include label vm.mountthor.dev/customer-bootstrap=true and must not contain credentials or private keys.

parameters.description: Tenant namespace returned by Get Account.
parameters.name: namespace

delete.description: Deletes one tenant-scoped VM bootstrap ConfigMap by name.

parameters.description: Tenant namespace returned by Get Account.
parameters.name: namespace

parameters.description: Kubernetes object name for the ConfigMap.
parameters.name: name

get.description: Returns one tenant-scoped, non-secret VM bootstrap ConfigMap. Generic ConfigMaps and Secrets are not part of the customer API.

parameters.description: Tenant namespace returned by Get Account.
parameters.name: namespace

parameters.description: Kubernetes object name for the ConfigMap.
parameters.name: name
